name: Apple Fluff Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple sauce, lemon juice, salt, flour, and well-beaten egg yolks in a bowl.
2. Cook over hot water until thick and smooth.
3. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Pour into a pastry-lined pie pan.
5. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) until the crust is brown and the filling is firm.
